title: Apply to be a Camp Director or Assistant Camp Director
description: Application form to volunteer as a Camp Director or Assistant Camp Director with the National Summer Camp Programme 2026.

config.subject: Your Camp Director application has been received

steps.title: Tell us what you are applying for

overrides.label: Which position are you applying for?
Which area are you interested in?

options.label: Working with children who need additional support

steps.title: Choose your camp preference
steps.description: Select up to 3 camps. Your choices are not guaranteed. The Ministry will consider them when placing applicants.

steps.title: Tell us what you do now

overrides.label: Which of these best describes you now?
overrides.hint: Select all that apply. If you are unemployed, do not select 'Employed' or 'Self-employed'.

overrides.label: Are you a Give Back volunteer?
Do you have any health conditions or support needs to report?
Which health conditions or support needs do you have?

required.error: Select at least one health condition

overrides.label: Tell us about the physical limitation
Tell us about the visual limitation
Tell us about the hearing difficulty
Tell us about the other health condition or support need

required.error: Describe the other health condition or support need

overrides.label: Are you currently taking any medicine?

required.error: Describe the medicine you are taking

overrides.label: Are you allergic to any medicine?

required.error: Describe the medicine you are allergic to

steps.title: Tell us about your camp experience

overrides.label: Were you a camper or staff member?

behaviours.addAnotherLabel: Do you need to add another camp experience?

steps.title: Tell us about your work and volunteer experience

overrides.label: Do you have paid or volunteer work experience?

steps.title: Your work or volunteer experience details

overrides.label: Are you still in this role?

behaviours.addAnotherLabel: Do you need to add another work experience?

steps.title: Tell us about your references
steps.description: You must add 3 references. Your references must not be relatives. Ask each person before adding their contact details.

steps.title: Tell us about organisations you belong to

overrides.label: Do you belong to any organisations?

behaviours.addAnotherLabel: Do you need to add another organisation?

overrides.hint: For example, 2020. If you are still attending, enter "Present".
overrides.label: End year

behaviours.addAnotherLabel: Do you need to add another school or institution?

steps.title: Tell us about your training and qualifications

overrides.hint: For CXC, CSEC or CAPE, enter the subject. For example, Mathematics or English. For a certificate, course, diploma or degree, enter the name of the training or qualification.
overrides.label: Name or subject

behaviours.addAnotherLabel: Do you need to add another training or qualification?

steps.title: Tell us about your skills and activities

overrides.label: Do you have any skills or activities you can lead or help with at camp?

steps.title: Tell us about your skills and activities

overrides.hint: For example, first aid, public speaking, dance, cricket, sewing, drumming or budgeting.
overrides.label: What skill or activity can you support?
How can you support this activity?

options.label: I can help with this activity

overrides.label: Tell us about your experience with this skill or activity

behaviours.addAnotherLabel: Do you need to add another skill or activity?

steps.title: Tell us why you want to volunteer

overrides.label: What can you contribute to the camp?
What can a well-run camp contribute to children?

required.error: Describe what a well-run camp can contribute

overrides.label: What personal goals do you hope to achieve through this volunteer work?
Do you have any concerns about being responsible for children for at least 7 hours a day?

overrides.hint: Upload a clear photo of your face.
overrides.label: Photo for camp ID card

fileTypes.error: Upload a JPEG or PNG image

itemMaxSize.error: File must be no larger than 5 MB
File must be no larger than 5 MB
File must be no larger than 5 MB
File must be no larger than 5 MB
File must be no larger than 5 MB

steps.title: Check your answers
steps.description: Review all the information you have provided before submitting your application.

options.label: I confirm that the information in this application is true and correct to the best of my knowledge. I understand that my application may be refused, or I may be removed from the programme, if I give false information or leave out important information. I give permission for the Ministry of Youth, Sports and Community Empowerment to check the information I have provided to assess whether I am suitable for this volunteer position.

required.error: You must confirm the declaration to continue
